_note: VARC-tuned aggregate_claim definitions (migration spec §2/§3, per-paper). Cumulative-ablation observations that support a JOINT claim (not a single mechanism rung) are moved off their ladder-confused single-mechanism target onto the aggregate_claim, which rolls_up to the paper_thesis. Matched by observation pattern-text substring (cohort-stable). Do NOT move into the system core. P24/P25 (2D-ROPE/positional) are deliberately excluded: precision-audit flagged them as Fig7 ladder cross-links, an L1/link-v3 problem that must not be masked by claim reclassification.

aggregate_claims.gloss: Vision priors jointly explain the accuracy gain (cumulative ablation a->f)
Canvas-based design components jointly contribute to the gain (c->f)
